challenges.title: Software Challenges
challenges.description: Many businesses depend on manual processes, disconnected tools, slow systems, or software that cannot scale with operations.
challenges.secondaryDescription: We plan and build custom software around your workflows, users, integrations, security needs, and long-term business goals.

process.title: Our Software Development
process.description: We follow a practical development process from requirement discovery to design, build, testing, launch, and support.

steps.title: Discovery & Planning
items: Understand workflows, users, business goals, and technical requirements.
Define features, integrations, roles, data flows, and delivery priorities.

steps.title: Design & Development
items: Create user-friendly interfaces and scalable application architecture.
Build secure modules, APIs, dashboards, and admin workflows.

steps.title: Testing & Launch
items: Validate performance, usability, security, integrations, and core workflows.
Deploy the software and support improvements after launch.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Common questions about software development services in Patna.

items.question: What types of software do you develop?
items.answer: We build custom web applications, dashboards, portals, CRM workflows, automation systems, internal tools, API integrations, and business software.

items.question: Can you build software for our existing business process?
items.answer: Yes. We study your current workflows and design software that supports your team, customers, data, and operational goals.

items.question: Do you provide support after launch?
items.answer: Yes. We can provide maintenance, monitoring, bug fixes, performance improvements, security updates, and new feature development.

items.question: How much does software development cost in Patna?
items.answer: Cost depends on features, complexity, integrations, design needs, user roles, security requirements, and project timeline.
